chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 946 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.4233/2024 3. For hearing of main case 17.12.2025 Mr. Aqil Ahmed, advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 01.10.2025 learned counsel for respondent states upon instructions that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
